text: Adobe's stock has experienced notable volatility in recent trading sessions, with shares declining 18.6% over the past six months while the S&P 500 climbed 8.8% during the same period [C006]. Year-to-date, the stock has lost 17.8% as investors remain skeptical about the company's AI product monetization [C015]. In the most recent trading session, Adobe closed at $354.91, representing a -2.29% shift from the previous day [C014]. Despite the price pressure, RBC Capital reiterated an Outperform rating on the stock with a $480.00 price target on August 21, maintaining a bullish stance on long-term AI monetization upside despite increasing competition in the creative tools market [C013].
